home.hero_subtitle: A community-led environmental initiative for the future of Angola
home.mission_body: Projecto Ecológico UJIMA believes sustainability starts at the local level. We work side by side with communities to build a greener, more resilient future for Angola.
home.cta_body: Join our volunteer community and help transform Angola.

info.subtitle: Learn about what we do for our community and the environment
info.intro: We work across multiple areas to drive sustainable development in Angola — from environmental education to natural resource management.
